name: Asparagus Vichyssoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the asparagus and cut into 1-inch pieces.
2. Combine the asparagus and 1/4 cup water in a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner unsealed for ventilation, and microwave on high for 5 minutes.
4. Let stand for 3 minutes.
5. Add the remaining 3 cups of water, potatoes, and bouillon granules to the asparagus mixture.
6. Cover with plastic wrap and seal completely, then microwave on high for 10 minutes, stirring once.
7. Reduce power to medium and microwave an additional 15 to 18 minutes, or until heated through but not boiling.
8. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
9. Pour about one-third of the mixture into a food processor and process until smooth. Transfer back to the casserole dish.
10. Repeat with the remaining asparagus mixture.
11. Stir in the milk, salt, and white pepper; cover and refrigerate for about 8 hours, stirring well before serving.
12. Garnish with lemon rind strips if desired.
